Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Green, 415-621-1501 for Plaintiffs/Opposing parties Dr. and Mrs. Benjamin Yang, L.AC.O.M.D
Gayle Gough, 415-848-8900 for Defendant/Moving party Pacific Gas and Electric Company.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Is Taken Under Submission.
